sections.one_line: Default connector install and disabled-by-default service behavior
Per-install service state record and atomic store for enabled/disabled service settings
Disabled service hiding and invocation blocking at surfacing and dispatch layers
CLI reference for service state, credentials, and setup commands
Initial setup behavior for first run, including service-state bootstrap and interactive prompts
Credential key generation, permissions, status reporting, and hook restrictions
Shared hook runner for installs and updates, handling registration, ordering, checks, and status tracking.
Migrating existing installs to synthetic state for pre-spec data dirs without service_state.json
Audit event categories for install lifecycle actions and scope rules
Placement of setup, service-state, hook, and CLI code in the Kernos tree
Composition of disabled flags, relevance, and promotion across Kernos services, connectors, and surfacing primitives
Future plans for onboarding, connector installs, and install-hook support
